jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer — CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is building a company that thinks the same way — every store, every collection, every customer conversation: sharper, faster, unmistakably ours. AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization : Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication that understands who each customer actually is.
02 Store Clienteling : Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day.
03 Business Intelligence : Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer.
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams : Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/ NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand. We're visual people.
master_cv:
# Non-Technical Profile: Mark Thompson

## About Me
Marketing Director with 8 years of experience in brand strategy and digital growth.

## Professional Experience

### Marketing Director — BrandGrowth (2020 - Present)
- Increased organic traffic by 200% in 18 months.
- Managed a $5M annual advertising budget.

### Growth Manager — StartupX (2016 - 2020)
- Scaled user base from 10k to 500k.

## Skills
- Brand Strategy, Content Marketing, SEO
- Team Leadership, Budget Management

## Education
B.A. Communications — New York University

## Search Preferences (PRIVATE)
- Prefer Series B startups
- Constraint: Must be fully remote

s7_rewrite_context.max_5_bullet_guidance: Lead every bullet with a strong action verb and a measurable outcome. Replace weak verbs (Analyzed, Supported, Assisted) with ownership verbs (Built, Owned, Shipped, Drove). Keep all metrics exact.
s7_rewrite_context.founder_context: Co-founded by Simran Lal and her husband Raul Rai. Simran Lal is inspired by travel, India, and nature; Raul Rai previously Managing Director at Eight Roads Ventures.
interview_prep_hints: Describe a real project where you used an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) to solve a business problem.
How would you design a personalization engine for an e-commerce brand using Shopify APIs?
Walk us through how you would replace a BI dashboard with a conversational AI layer.

company_intelligence.founder_background: Co-founded by Simran Lal and her husband Raul Rai. Simran Lal is inspired by travel, India, and nature; Raul Rai previously Managing Director at Eight Roads Ventures.
company_intelligence.hiring_manager_context: Reports to CEO (Simran Lal or Raul Rai) — role is in CEO's office.
interview_questions_likely: Describe a real project where you used an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) to solve a business problem.
How would you design a personalization engine for an e-commerce brand using Shopify APIs?
Walk us through how you would replace a BI dashboard with a conversational AI layer.
How do you handle connecting disparate systems (APIs, webhooks, data pipelines) that weren't designed to work together?
Tell us about a time you built a front-end that balanced functionality with brand aesthetics.
unknowns: Specific tech stack beyond Shopify, MoEngage, Dynamics 365

must_haves: Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
Experience building with LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)

positioning_strategy.one_line_positioning: Marketing leader with no coding or AI engineering experience — not a fit for this technical role
positioning_strategy.narrative_angle: While the candidate brings deep understanding of consumer brand strategy and customer journeys, the role demands hands-on AI engineering skills (LLMs, Python, front-end) that are absent from their background.
positioning_strategy.tone_guidance: Be transparent: do not attempt to disguise lack of technical qualifications. If applying, clearly state how marketing insight could complement AI implementation, but fully acknowledge that no hands-on engineering is possible.
positioning_strategy.recruiter_first_impression_target: Immediately sees candidate lacks required technical skills; no further reading needed.
positioning_strategy.reasoning: The candidate's background is entirely in marketing and brand strategy, with no coding or AI development experience. All must-have requirements are unmet. The role demands an AI Product Engineer capable of building with LLMs, Python, SQL, and front-ends. No amount of transferable marketing knowledge can compensate for this fundamental skill gap. Therefore, SKIP.

application_pack.resume_markdown:
## Non-Technical Profile: Mark Thompson

## About Me

Marketing Director with 8 years of experience in brand strategy and digital growth, bringing deep consumer insight and customer journey expertise to complement AI implementation.

While hands-on AI engineering skills (LLMs, Python, front-end) are absent from my background, I offer strategic marketing leadership that can bridge brand vision with technical execution.

## Professional Experience

## Marketing Director — BrandGrowth (2020 - Present)

- Drove 200% organic traffic growth in 18 months through data-driven content strategy and SEO optimization, demonstrating business-outcome thinking that can inform AI-powered personalization.
- Managed a $5M annual advertising budget, allocating resources across channels to maximize ROI, a skill applicable to prioritizing AI investments for customer intelligence.

## Growth Manager — StartupX (2016 - 2020)

- Drove user acquisition from 10k to 500k through brand strategy and content marketing, providing customer journey insights that could inform AI-driven personalization.

## Skills

- Brand Strategy, Content Marketing, SEO
- Team Leadership, Budget Management

## Education

B.A. Communications — New York University
application_pack.cover_note: I have 8+ years leading brand strategy and content marketing at Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd., driving customer engagement through data-informed campaigns. While my expertise lies in marketing rather than engineering, I believe my deep understanding of consumer journeys can complement AI product development. However, I fully acknowledge that I lack the hands-on coding, LLM, and front-end skills this role requires.
application_pack.recruiter_message: Hi, I see you're hiring an AI Product Engineer at Nicobar. While my 8+ years in marketing and brand strategy are strong, I lack the required hands-on AI engineering skills (Python, LLMs, SQL, front-end) for this role.
